name: Deluxe Camp Chili with Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut jerky into small, bite-sized pieces.
2. In a heavy pot, simmer the jerky and cumin seeds gently in moderately hot fat/oil for one to two minutes, stirring steadily to prevent burning.
3. Add chili powder and stir until well mixed. The amount of chili powder will depend on the heat of the jerky and your taste preferences.
4. Add onion flakes, oregano, powdered cumin, garlic powder, and enough water to cover generously.
5. Stir and simmer for one to two hours, adding water as the jerky absorbs it.
6. Allow the chili to cool, then reheat before serving.
7. If a thicker chili is desired, add a small amount of flour mixed with hot liquid from the pot, cooking until the desired consistency is reached, stirring frequently.
